tree.name: Isaac Okoro
tree.tradeDescription: Bulls traded Lonzo Ball to Cavaliers for Isaac Okoro. Cleveland also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Lonzo Ball
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Bulls traded Tomas Satoransky, Garrett Temple, cash, and a 2024 2nd round pick (Adem Bona, CHI own) to Pelicans for Lonzo Ball via sign-and-trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Tomas Satoransky
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent from Washington Wizards

assetsGivenUp.name: Garrett Temple
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent. Included in Lonzo Ball S&T to NOP.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick via CHI
assetsGivenUp.note: Chicago's own 2024 2nd round pick, sent to NOP in Lonzo Ball S&T

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to NOP in Lonzo Ball S&T
